hypothesis: Add price drop flag features: binary indicator for whether sell_price dropped vs 7 days ago (price_drop_7) and vs 28 days ago (price_drop_28). Also add price_drop_pct_7 and price_drop_pct_28 as continuous versions. Price drops drive purchase spikes — a key M5 signal. Uses fast vectorized groupby shift (no rolling). Based on exp_0067 which succeeded at 0.95508 but may have had an issue. Keeping all other settings from best run (exp_0044, WRMSSE=0.94391) with lag_365, lag_168, num_leaves=256.
